mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in nonfarm payrolls signals weakening labor market conditions that reduce corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS declines by > 50k.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in residential construction permits and consumer spending signals strong demand conditions that drive equity valuations higher, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between HOUST and RSAFS shows negative coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions, or 60d returns fall below 1% in 75% of co-moving positive periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly contraction in industrial production signals supply-side bottlenecks that increase inflationary pressures and reduce equity multiples, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO declines by > 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A 12-month decline in the CPI inflation rate signals disinflationary expectations that lower real interest rates and boost equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of instances where CPIAUCSL declines by > 0.5% annually.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in unemployment rate and decline in labor participation rate signals a deteriorating labor market that reduces corporate profit margins, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between UNRATE and PAYEMS shows positive coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions, or 5d returns rise above 0.5% in 60% of co-moving negative periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in GDP growth forecasts combined with rising consumer confidence signals stronger demand that drives equity earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between GDPC1 and CPIAUCSL shows negative coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions, or 60d returns fall below 1% in 75% of co-moving positive periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly contraction in industrial production combined with rising commodity prices signals supply-side disruptions that increase corporate costs and reduce equity returns, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between INDPRO and CPIAUCSL shows positive coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions, or 20d returns rise above 0.5% in 60% of co-moving negative periods.
